retry_reason: Put wrapper decrements refcount; if refcount were already zero, that's a double-free bug—retrying would cause use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper for struct dpll_device. It releases one reference held by the caller. It first calls dpll_device_tracker_free to clean up the tracker association, then decrements the refcount. If the refcount reaches zero, it performs full teardown: destroys the pin_refs xarray, removes the device from the global xarray, and frees the memory. After calling this function, the caller must not access the dpll_device, as its reference is released and the object may be freed. The operation is unconditional and void-returning; the caller does not need to check a return value.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release a reference on a dpll_device: decrements refcount and frees if last reference. Tracker free and cleanup are part of the put/free path.
